description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer with a thick, cylindrical handle and a large, rectangular metal head. The head is solid and blocky, featuring two flat striking faces on either end, suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle appears to be wrapped or coated with a dark, textured material, likely for enhanced grip and shock absorption. The head is metallic, with a slightly reflective surface and some subtle color variation, possibly from use or manufacturing. The overall design is utilitarian, built for heavy-duty tasks such as breaking concrete or driving stakes. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its functional, industrial character.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a thick, dark handle and a large, rectangular metal head. The design is utilitarian and built for powerful impacts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat striking face of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle and the rectangular profile of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the handle and the opposite striking face of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length and the side profile of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a dark, rubberized ergonomic grip, likely textured for slip resistance and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledgehammer head with two flat striking faces, made of solid steel for heavy impact tasks.
